movie.actors: John Stockwell, Danielle von Zerneck, Fisher Stevens, Raphael Sbarge
movie.plot: Michael and Ellie break into a military junkyard to find a science project for Michael's class, and discover a strange glowing orb which absorbs electricity. When the orb begins to blend past, present, and future, its up to Michael and Ellie to stop the orb and save mankind.
movie.title: My Science Project
